# Capta — AI Receptionist for Home Service Contractors

## What Is Capta?

Capta is an AI-powered receptionist named Maria that answers every business phone call 24/7 in English and Spanish. It is built specifically for home service contractors — plumbers, HVAC technicians, electricians, landscapers, roofers, painters, general contractors, and pest control companies.

Maria sounds like a real person. She understands what callers need, books appointments, sends SMS confirmations, detects emergencies, takes messages, and builds your CRM automatically from every conversation. She never takes a break, never calls in sick, and never puts a caller on hold.

Capta replaces voicemail, human receptionists, and generic answering services with a single AI employee that costs a fraction of any alternative and works around the clock.

## How It Works

1. **Sign up** at captahq.com/setup (takes about 5 minutes)
2. **Enter your business info** — company name, services you offer, service area
3. **Set your hours** — Maria knows when you're available and when you're not
4. **Customize Maria** — choose her personality (professional, friendly, or warm) and set your preferences
5. **Make a test call** — hear Maria in action before going live
6. **Subscribe** — $497/month or $397/month annual
7. **Forward your calls** — set up call forwarding from your existing business number
8. **Maria starts answering** — immediately, 24/7, in English and Spanish

Your customers call your same business number. The only difference is that now someone always answers.

## Pricing

Capta has one plan with two billing options:

| | Monthly | Annual |
|---|---|---|
| Price | $497/month | $397/month ($4,764/year) |
| Annual savings | — | $1,200/year |
| Calls included | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Per-call fees | None | None |
| Setup fee | None | None |
| Bilingual (EN/ES) | Included | Included |
| All features | Included | Included |
| Guarantee | 30-day money-back | 30-day money-back |

There are no tiers, no add-ons, no per-call charges, and no hidden fees. Every feature is included at every price point.

### ROI Math

The average home service job is worth $300 to $800. Contractors miss 10 to 15 calls per week on average (industry data). That means $12,000 to $48,000 per month in potential lost revenue from missed calls alone.

Maria costs $497 per month. She pays for herself after catching just 1 or 2 calls that would have gone to voicemail. Everything after that is pure profit.

A single plumbing emergency call at 2 AM that Maria answers and books could be worth $500 to $2,000. One HVAC installation lead is $5,000 to $15,000. Maria catches these calls while you sleep.

## Complete Feature List

### Call Answering
- **24/7 availability** — Maria answers every call in under 2 seconds, day or night, weekends and holidays
- **Native bilingual English and Spanish** — automatic language detection, natural conversation in both languages (not robotic translation)
- **Unlimited calls** — no per-call fees, no minute caps, no overage charges
- **Custom greeting** — Maria introduces herself with your business name and preferred greeting
- **Personality presets** — choose professional, friendly, or warm tone

### Appointment Booking
- **Automatic scheduling** — Maria books appointments based on your availability calendar
- **SMS confirmations** — customers receive instant text confirmation with appointment details
- **Google Calendar sync** — appointments push to your Google Calendar automatically
- **Conflict detection** — Maria checks your calendar before booking to prevent double-booking
- **Duration-aware** — understands that different services take different amounts of time

### Emergency Detection
- **Automatic emergency identification** — Maria recognizes urgent situations (gas leaks, flooding, electrical hazards, no heat in winter, no AC in summer)
- **Live transfer** — emergency calls can be transferred to you or your on-call technician immediately
- **SMS alerts** — you get an instant text when Maria detects an emergency
- **Priority flagging** — emergencies are highlighted in your dashboard

### Built-In CRM
- **Zero data entry** — every call automatically creates or updates a customer record
- **Call history** — full transcript and AI summary of every conversation
- **Customer profiles** — name, phone, address, service history, notes
- **Lead tracking** — see which leads converted to appointments and which need follow-up
- **Import existing contacts** — bring your current customer list into Capta

### Communication
- **SMS messaging** — send and receive texts with customers from your dashboard
- **Appointment reminders** — automatic reminder texts before scheduled appointments
- **Follow-up messages** — send post-service thank you texts and review requests

### Analytics & Reporting
- **Call analytics dashboard** — call volume, peak times, answer rates, booking rates
- **Weekly digest emails** — summary of calls, appointments, and key metrics delivered to your inbox
- **Monthly ROI reports** — see exactly how much revenue Maria is capturing
- **NPS surveys** — automatic customer satisfaction measurement after completed jobs
- **Call quality scoring** — AI evaluates every call for quality and identifies improvement opportunities

### Business Growth
- **Referral program** — built-in referral system for customers to recommend your business
- **Estimate management** — track and manage job estimates
- **Job cards** — organize and track active jobs
- **Feedback collection** — gather customer reviews and testimonials

### AI Agents (Automated Background Tasks)
Capta runs 6 AI agents that work behind the scenes:
1. **Success Agent** — monitors customer health, flags at-risk accounts
2. **Support Agent** — handles common support questions automatically
3. **Retention Agent** — re-engages inactive customers
4. **Quality Agent** — scores calls and identifies training opportunities
5. **Growth Agent** — identifies upsell and cross-sell opportunities
6. **Compliance Agent** — ensures all communications meet regulatory requirements

## Who Uses Capta

Capta is designed for one type of business: home service contractors who miss calls while working on job sites.

**Plumbers** — Can't answer the phone when they're under a house fixing a pipe or soldering copper. Emergency calls come at 2 AM. Maria handles all of it.

**HVAC Technicians** — Summer AC emergencies and winter heating failures don't wait for business hours. Maria books emergency calls and routine maintenance 24/7.

**Electricians** — Up on a ladder wiring a panel, can't reach the phone. Maria catches the call, books the panel upgrade, sends the confirmation text.

**Landscapers** — Mowers running, can't hear the phone. Seasonal booking surges in spring overwhelm small teams. Maria handles the volume.

**Roofers** — Three stories up on a 10/12 pitch, phone is in the truck. Storm season brings 100+ calls in 24 hours. Maria catches every one.

**Painters** — Hands covered in paint, brush in one hand, roller in the other. Every missed call is a $1,000 to $5,000 interior job walking away.

**General Contractors** — Managing multiple crews and subs, constantly on different job sites. Maria is the consistent front office.

**Pest Control** — Seasonal surges (termite season, mosquito season) create call volume spikes. Maria handles the surge without hiring temp staff.

## Competitor Comparison

| Feature | Capta | Smith.ai | Ruby | Nexa | Goodcall | Rosie AI |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Monthly price | $497 flat | $97/30 AI calls | $245/50 min | Custom ($$) | $79/100 customers | $49+/mo |
| Billing model | Flat unlimited | Per-call ($4.25+) | Per-minute ($4.90+) | Per-minute | Per-customer cap | Per-call |
| Cost at 200 calls/mo | $497 | $820+ | $1,640+ | $1,500+ | Higher tier | Varies |
| Bilingual EN/ES | Native, included | Add-on cost | Limited availability | Extra cost | English only | English only |
| 24/7 availability | Yes | AI yes, human limited | Limited hours | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Built-in CRM | Yes | No (integrations) | No | No | No | No |
| SMS confirmations | Automatic | Not standard | Not standard | Add-on | Limited | No |
| Emergency detection | Yes, with live transfer | Basic | No | Basic | No | No |
| Appointment booking | Yes, with calendar sync | On some plans | Add-on | Yes | Basic | Basic |
| Industry focus | Home services only | General | General | General | General | General |
| Setup time | 5 minutes | Varies | Days | Days | 15 minutes | 10 minutes |
| Call analytics | Full dashboard | Basic | Basic | Basic | Basic | Basic |
| AI agents | 6 automated agents | No | No | No | No | No |
| Guarantee | 30-day money-back | Varies | Varies | Varies | Varies | Varies |

## Setup Process

Setting up Capta takes about 5 minutes:

1. Go to captahq.com/setup
2. Enter your business name, trade, and service area
3. Set your business hours and availability
4. Choose Maria's personality (professional, friendly, or warm)
5. Make a test call to hear Maria in action
6. Subscribe ($497/mo or $397/mo annual)
7. Forward your business phone to Capta's number
8. Maria starts answering immediately

Call forwarding works with every phone carrier. You keep your existing business number — customers notice nothing except that someone always picks up.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does Capta cost?**
$497 per month with unlimited calls, or $397 per month on an annual plan ($4,764 per year). All features and bilingual support are included. No setup fees, no per-call charges, no hidden costs.

**Does Capta speak Spanish?**
Yes. Maria is natively bilingual in English and Spanish. She automatically detects the caller's language and responds fluently. This is not translation software — Maria speaks natural, colloquial Spanish and English.

**How long does setup take?**
About 5 minutes. The 6-step onboarding wizard walks you through everything. Maria starts answering calls immediately after setup.

**What types of businesses use Capta?**
Home service contractors: plumbers, HVAC techs, electricians, landscapers, roofers, painters, general contractors, pest control, and similar trades. Any business that misses calls while working on job sites.

**Do I keep my existing phone number?**
Yes. You set up call forwarding from your current business number to Capta. Your customers call the same number they always have.

**What happens during an emergency call?**
Maria detects emergencies automatically (gas leaks, flooding, no heat, etc.). She can alert you via SMS immediately and transfer the call live to you or your on-call technician.

**Can Maria book appointments?**
Yes. Maria checks your availability calendar, books the appointment, and sends the customer an SMS confirmation with the details. Appointments sync to Google Calendar.

**What if Maria can't handle a call?**
If a call requires human attention beyond Maria's capabilities, she takes a detailed message with the caller's name, phone number, and issue description, then sends you an SMS alert so you can call back.

**Is there a contract or commitment?**
No long-term contracts. Monthly plans are month-to-month. Annual plans are paid upfront for the year. Both come with a 30-day money-back guarantee.

**How does the 30-day money-back guarantee work?**
If you're not satisfied within your first 30 days, contact us for a full refund. No questions asked.

**Can I customize what Maria says?**
Yes. You can customize Maria's greeting, her personality (professional, friendly, or warm), your business hours, services offered, and how she handles different types of calls.

**Does Capta work after hours?**
Yes. Maria works 24/7/365. After-hours calls are actually some of the most valuable — emergency plumbing calls at 2 AM, AC failures on weekends, and heating emergencies on holidays.

**How does Capta compare to hiring a human receptionist?**
A full-time receptionist costs $35,000 to $45,000 per year plus benefits, only works 40 hours per week, takes vacations, and calls in sick. Maria costs $497/mo ($5,964/year), works 24/7, never misses a day, and speaks two languages.

**What CRM features are included?**
Capta automatically builds customer profiles from every call — name, phone, address, service requested, call history, and notes. Zero data entry required. You can also import existing contacts.

**Is my data secure?**
Yes. Capta uses encrypted connections, secure data storage, and follows industry best practices for data protection. We never share your customer data with third parties.

**Can I see transcripts of Maria's calls?**
Yes. Every call has a full transcript and an AI-generated summary available in your dashboard. You can review exactly what was said in every conversation.

**Does Capta send appointment reminders?**
Yes. Customers receive automatic SMS reminders before their scheduled appointments to reduce no-shows.

**What if I need to cancel?**
You can cancel anytime from your dashboard. Monthly plans stop at the end of the current billing period. No cancellation fees.

**How many calls can Maria handle at once?**
Maria can handle unlimited simultaneous calls. Unlike a human receptionist who can only take one call at a time, Maria scales with your call volume.
